levels.body: The phrase "heat of the day", which is connected to "tending of the vines" through an intertextual reference, also appears in Matthew 20:12: "Saying, These last have wrought but one hour, and thou hast made them equal unto us, which have borne the burden and heat of the day."
worksCited: *King James Version*. Bible Gateway, https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Matthew+20%3A12&version=KJV. Accessed 19. Jul. 2019.
